programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A retired soldier (Jeff Wincott) attempts to prove his late brother's death was not a hunting accident, but murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben is asked to defend Spencer Hamilton who is accused of the murder of a member of his late brother's hunting party.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Defending a widow accused of murdering her second husband, Ben suspects her jealous son (Brian Bloom) of the crime.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When a priceless crown is stolen during a benefit gala held by the Lawrenceton library, Aurora and the Real Murders Club must investigate who would kill to get their hands on it.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.sub-title: Reunited and It Feels So Deadly
programme.desc: Aurora's high school reunion turns deadly when a body is found in the hotel pool; Aurora and her Real Murders Club help investigate which classmate was most likely to kill.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica becomes involved in an internal police investigation when a colleague is left for dead in an accident in which a rookie policeman is killed.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica investigates the murder of a visiting romance novelist's assistant, who was having an affair with the writer's publisher husband.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's trip to Hong Kong is interrupted by the murder of an American businessman negotiating a merger with a Chinese tycoon.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica's editor is accused of murdering a developer opposed to the preservation of a historic New York brownstone.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A stranger obsessed with restoring a Cabot Cove landmark is killed after he is suspected of being a vampire.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica comes to the aid of a promising young reporter when he is suspected of murdering a rival magazine's unscrupulous publisher.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica happens on a computerized clue to a murder while writing a mystery story for a friend's interactive video game company.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Researching a novel, Jessica unravels the mystery of a Thoroughbred trainer's (Mickey Rooney) murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: When the administrator who threatened his career is murdered, Mark is a suspect and can clear his name only by committing a different murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A psychic envisions a murder during the taping of an infomercial; with George Hamilton.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to clean up the literary world when three lovely authors who penned a Hollywood tell-all book have their lives threatened.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects foul play on the part of a wholesome TV personality when a radio shock jock is electrocuted.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: The disappearance of $2.3 million from a federal reserve bank leads Remington and Laura into the world of punk rock.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: Laura finds a murdered Mexican and a diamond-stuffed tuna on her doorstep; an IRS investigator makes inquiries.

programme.title: Remington Steele
programme.desc: IRS agent Mildred pursues Laura and Remington through Mexico as they investigate the mystery behind the diamonds.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A district attorney matches wits with a much-despised author (Tricia O'Neil) after the writer's best friend dies.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Ben and Julie go to Baltimore to defend a case, the prosecuting attorney turns out to be Julie's ex-husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a circus clown accused of killing his partner; Conrad gets trapped in a tiger's cage.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends a director accused of killing an aging actress (Anita Morris) during her horror-film death scene.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ben defends an old friend accused of murdering a stock-market swindler (David Birney).

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: When Aida Teagarden's real estate client is found murdered, her sleuthing daughter, Aurora, sets out with her fiancé, Nick, and the Real Murders Club to solve the murder.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries
programme.desc: Just days before Aurora's wedding, a body is discovered, and she fears her father may be a suspect; she and Nick race to solve the cold case before they walk down the aisle.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: In Ireland, the son of Jessica's friend (Fionnula Flanagan) is accused of killing another family member (Andrew Robinson).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.sub-title: Love and Hate in Cabot Cove
programme.desc: Jessica investigates her accountant and uncovers his gambling, an illegal casino and a police officer's murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A man (George Segal) who claims Jessica's novel closely resembles the story of his first wife's murder sues Jessica.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A London friend invites Jessica to rewrite a play based on her novel and is accused of murdering a manipulative producer/financier.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Her plane laid-over in a small British Columbia town, Jessica probes two murders related to a local mining company.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica discovers clues to a puzzling murder when she is a guest star on a friend's television cooking show.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: An art gallery owner is stabbed to death with a sculpture belonging to Jessica's friend (Loretta Swit).

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica attempts to clear the name of a Cabot Cove fisherman who is suspected of murdering a Chicago hit man.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica refuses to believe that the editor of her latest book has committed suicide and is determined to find out the truth.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Infrared cameras seem to prove Jessica's writing student is guilty of killing his abusive stepfather.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The closing of a family-owned department store leads to a double murder in New York, and Jessica has no shortage of suspects in the crime.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Fresh blood stains indicate foul play when Seth (William Windom) disappears; a proliferation of strangers in town raises Jessica's suspicions.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A Texas trucker (Earl Holliman) is charged with insurance fraud; his son (Patrick Cassidy) is accused of murder.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica searches for a motive when a legendary maestro, who is about to lose control of his protege, is found murdered.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Burglaries and a murder occur when the carnival comes to Cabot Cove but doesn't seem to bring in a great deal of money.

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Internal strife at an earthquake-shaken California zoo culminates in an employee's death from snake bite.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mysteries
programme.desc: When Jennifer's friend and self-storage facility owner Martin turns up murdered just hours after auctioning off an abandoned storage unit full of unique items to Jennifer, she is immediately pulled on the case as a key eyewitness.
